NORTHERN UTAH

The Problem

Utah's Entrepreneurs Are Thriving.
There's Nowhere to Actually Be One.

🏠
No Dedicated Home

Weber, Davis, Morgan, Box Elder & Cache counties hold 750,000+ residents — and zero invitation-only entrepreneur clubs.

💼
Co-Working Isn't Enough

Generic shared spaces lack the culture, caliber, and lifestyle that serious founders actually want. You don't close deals at WeWork.

🌐
Networks Don't Have Roots

YPO, EO, and BNI are in SLC — distant, expensive, waitlisted, and without a physical home you can walk into every day.

Utah is the #1 economic outlook state for 18 consecutive years. The entrepreneurs are here. The club isn't.
The Solution

The Only Private Club Built for Northern Utah's Entrepreneur Class.

◆Invitation-only — curated, not open to everyone
◆Purpose-built for deal flow, peer learning, and lifestyle
◆Not a co-working space. Not a gym. Not a country club.
◆A true home base for builders — something Northern Utah has never had

Member Experience

A Tuesday at The 19th Hole.

7:30 AM
Pickleball before the city wakes up — warm up with a member who's closing a deal you'll hear about at lunch.
9:00 AM
Coffee with a peer who's already built what you're building. Real answers. No consultants. No agendas.
11:00 AM
Podcast studio booked — broadcast-quality recording in 30 minutes. No Zoom. No excuses.
12:30 PM
Private conference room lunch. No noisy restaurants. The right people across the table from you.
3:00 PM
Barber chair. Back to work in 30 minutes, sharper than when you sat down.
6:00 PM
Golf simulator with a potential partner. The deal closes somewhere around hole 7.
This isn't a perk — it's a competitive advantage.
Proof of Concept

This Model Works. Here's the Evidence.

A comparable Utah private members club opened August 2024. Here's what happened:

90 Days
to break even
operational break-even in first quarter

at 77 member target

industry standard for private clubs

same target model as The 19th Hole

The 19th Hole targets the same model — with a larger addressable market, a real estate asset underneath the investment, and operators who have built communities before. Zach Spencer already runs a live membership club. This isn't theory.

What You Own. What You Get.

OWNERSHIP
◆General Partner status — not a passive LP

MEMBERSHIP

◆Full facility access — all amenities, all hours
◆Founding Circle recognition — permanent
◆Priority on all club events and bookings

Estimates only. Actual deductions depend on individual tax circumstances. Consult your tax professional before investing.

First
